tagline: Your Pool Should Be an Oasis

hero.headline: Your Pool Deserves the Stanton Standard
hero.subheadline: For 18 years, families across Thousand Oaks and the Conejo Valley have trusted Stanton Pools for remodeling, resurfacing, and weekly care. We collect nothing until the job is done and you love the result.
checkmarks: No payment until job is complete

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Remodel to Weekly Upkeep
services.subtitle: From a cracked surface to a complete backyard transformation, Stanton Pools handles every stage of pool ownership so you can focus on making memories.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Resurfacing
cards.description: Complete pool renovations including replastering, tile and coping upgrades, copper-to-PVC plumbing conversions, and full equipment overhauls that bring aging pools back to life.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly care: water chemistry testing, skimmer and basket cleaning, equipment checks, light inspections, netting, vacuuming, and surface integrity reviews.

cards.title: Spa & Jacuzzi Additions
cards.description: Custom-designed spas built to complement your existing pool, adding therapeutic hot water features that make your backyard a true year-round retreat.

cards.title: Structural Crack Repair
cards.description: Expert structural repairs that restore pool integrity and stop leaks before they cause costly damage. We extend the life of your pool investment.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrade
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, filters, variable-speed motors, and Wi-Fi control systems — diagnosed, repaired, or upgraded for peak efficiency and lower energy bills.

cards.title: Salt Water Conversions
cards.description: Professional conversion from chlorine to salt water for silkier, gentler swimming with lower long-term chemical costs and virtually no chlorine smell.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Pool

steps.title: Schedule a Free Inspection
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. Eric or a senior team member will visit your property, assess your pool, and provide a transparent quote — no pressure, no hidden fees.

steps.title: We Get to Work
steps.description: Our licensed, Health Department-certified team handles everything on schedule. You'll get clear progress updates and we don't collect a dime until you're satisfied.

steps.title: Love Your Pool Again
steps.description: Dive into a pool that looks brand new. With our 100% Satisfaction Guarantee, if anything isn't perfect, we come back and make it right — no questions asked.

about.label: Why Homeowners Choose Stanton Pools
about.headline: Family-Owned, Owner-Operated, and Proud of Every Project
about.description: Since 2008, Eric Stanton and his team have been transforming pools across Ventura and Los Angeles Counties. With C-53 and D-35 Contractor Licenses, Health Department-certified water chemistry training, and 250+ five-star reviews, we've built our reputation one backyard at a time. We never ask for payment until the work is done and you're completely satisfied.

features.title: Owner on Every Project
features.description: Eric Stanton is personally involved in every remodel and renovation — you work directly with the owner, not a revolving door of subcontractors.

features.title: $0 Until You're Satisfied
features.description: We collect no payment until the job is complete and you love the result. That's how confident we are in our work.

features.title: Health Dept. Certified Team
features.description: Our technicians are trained by a certified Health Department professional for precise water chemistry — keeping your family safe every swim.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get an honest quote with no hidden fees and no upselling. We believe fair pricing builds lasting relationships.

guarantee.headline: Our 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: We don't collect a single dollar until you're completely happy with the finished work. If something isn't right, we come back and fix it at no additional cost. That's the Stanton Pools promise — we stand behind every project because your trust is everything.

faqs.question: How soon can you start my pool remodel?
faqs.answer: Most remodeling projects begin within 2-3 weeks of your approved estimate. For weekly maintenance, we can typically start within a week. Call us and we'll work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Do you really not charge anything upfront?
faqs.answer: That's right — $0 due until the job is complete and you're satisfied. We believe you shouldn't pay for work you haven't seen and approved. It keeps us accountable and gives you total peace of mind.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Thousand Oaks, Westlake Village, Woodland Hills, Simi Valley, Newbury Park, Agoura Hills, Calabasas, Encino, Sherman Oaks, and surrounding areas throughout the Conejo Valley, Simi Valley, and San Fernando Valley.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We hold C-53 and D-35 Contractor Licenses (License #1009474) and are fully licensed, bonded, and insured. Our team is also trained by a certified Health Department technician for water chemistry.

faqs.question: What makes Stanton Pools different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: Three things: Eric Stanton is personally involved in every project, we collect $0 until you're satisfied, and we have 250+ five-star reviews across Google, Yelp, HomeAdvisor, and Nextdoor. Our reputation is built on trust and transparency.

testimonials.name: Steve B.
testimonials.text: What truly sets Stanton Pools apart is their commitment to honesty and integrity. Everything came out better than expected! 5 stars all around.

testimonials.name: Andrea H.
testimonials.text: Our old sad looking pool is now our beautiful oasis thanks to Stanton Pools. The transformation was unbelievable.

testimonials.name: David W.
testimonials.text: If Yelp had the ability to give 10 stars, that's what I would give. Eric and his team are simply the best in the business.
